items.title: GPT-5.6 used a prompt to close a 30-year gap in convex optimization
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 通过提示解决凸优化30年难题
items.title_en: GPT-5.6 Solves 30-Year Convex Optimization Problem with Prompt
items.summary: GPT-5.6 used a prompt to close a 30-year gap in convex optimization, marking a major AI-driven mathematical breakthrough.

items.title: The Kimi K3 Moment
items.title_zh: Kimi K3以更低成本达到前沿性能
items.title_en: Kimi K3 Achieves Frontier Performance at Lower Cost
items.summary: Kimi K3 achieves frontier model performance at dramatically lower cost, sparking debate on AI distillation, pricing wars, and potential government restrictions.

items.title: Fable 5 vs. GPT-5.6 Sol on an NP-Hard Problem: Does /goal help?
items.title_zh: Fable 5 vs GPT-5.6 Sol 解决NP难问题：/goal 是否有帮助？
items.title_en: Fable 5 vs. GPT-5.6 Sol on NP-Hard: Does /goal help?
items.summary: A comparison of Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol on an NP-hard problem, evaluating the impact of the '/goal' parameter.

items.title: LG monitors silently install software through Windows Update without consent
items.title_zh: LG显示器通过Windows Update静默安装软件
items.title_en: LG monitors silently install software via Windows Update
items.summary: LG monitors automatically install software via Windows Update without user consent, raising serious privacy and security concerns.

items.title: What AI did to stackoverflow in a graph
items.title_zh: 图表显示Stack Overflow衰落与AI和审核相关
items.title_en: Graph Shows Stack Overflow Decline Linked to AI and Moderation
items.summary: A graph illustrating Stack Overflow's decline in activity, with community comments attributing it to AI, excessive moderation, and poor community management.

items.title: Goodbye, and Thanks for All the Bikesheds
items.title_zh: PHK以自行车棚比喻告别反思
items.title_en: PHK Bids Farewell with Reflections on Bikeshedding
items.summary: Poul-Henning Kamp reflects on the bikeshedding metaphor and its implications in software development, bidding farewell.

items.title: Claude make Fable 5 permanent
items.title_zh: Anthropic将Claude Fable 5永久纳入高级计划
items.title_en: Anthropic makes Claude Fable 5 permanent in premium plans
items.summary: Anthropic reverses plan to remove Claude Fable 5 from subscriptions, making it permanent in premium plans due to competition.

items.title: Did blatant AI Slop just win a 25K USD Deepmind / Kaggle Grand Prize? [D]
items.title_zh: 被指为垃圾AI的提交赢得2.5万美元DeepMind/Kaggle大奖
items.title_en: Alleged AI Slop Wins $25K DeepMind/Kaggle Prize
items.summary: A Reddit post alleges that a Kaggle/DeepMind competition awarded $25k to a submission with nonsensical content, sparking debate about AI research evaluation and integrity.

items.title: SpaceX 与五角大楼谈判提供 AI 算力，交易或达数十亿美元
items.title_zh: SpaceX与五角大楼谈判数十亿美元AI算力交易
items.title_en: Spacex in talks with Pentagon for AI computing deal worth billions
items.summary: SpaceX正与美国国防部谈判提供AI算力，交易金额或达数十亿美元。

items.title: 台积电宣布下一代A14制程技术将于2028年投产  台积电计划在2028年开始生产A14制程，旨在保持芯片行业的领先地位。
items.title_zh: 台积电宣布A14制程将于2028年投产
items.title_en: TSMC Announces A14 Process Technology for 2028
items.summary: TSMC announces A14 process technology to enter production in 2028, promising speed and power improvements over N2.

items.title: 特朗普政府拟设类似 FINRA 的独立机构审查顶尖 AI 模型
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府拟设类似FINRA的AI监管机构
items.title_en: Trump admin proposes FINRA-like watchdog for top AI models
items.summary: U.S. considers creating FINRA-like independent watchdog to vet top AI models, aiming to address security concerns and industry dissatisfaction with temporary controls.

items.title: 柬国航购 20 架 C909 成首家批量采购外国载旗航司
items.title_zh: 柬国航购20架C909 创外国批量采购先例
items.title_en: Cambodia's flag carrier orders 20 COMAC C909 jets
items.summary: Cambodia's national airline signs deal to buy 20 COMAC C909 aircraft, becoming the first foreign flag carrier to make a bulk purchase.
